description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a modern suburban appearance, featuring a combination of flat and gable roof sections. The exterior walls are clad in brown brick, and the house is surrounded by a simple concrete or paved base. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property is landscaped with a few trees and shrubs, adding greenery to the urban setting. The main entryway is recessed and features a simple door, with no prominent porch or decorative columns.
description: A two-story brown brick house with large rectangular windows, a mix of flat and gable roofs, and minimal landscaping with a few trees.
description_view_0: Side view showing the flat and gable roof sections, brown brick walls, and a tree in the foreground.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway, symmetrical window arrangement, and two trees flanking the house.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the brick facade, large windows, and a prominent tree to the right.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back windows, roof structure, and a large tree close to the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with no porch, steps, or decorative columns; simple and functional.
